records.pMessage:
Warning! All other abilities will
be removed when this is equipped.
Do you want to continue?

Add friends to use the
Abilink feature.
Try adding some friends!

The following support abilities will be
removed if you change the abilink.
You have no commands for using magic.
Select all recommended equipment from your inventory.
Select an outfit that changes appearance.
Select a newly acquired weapon or shield.
Select a piece of light armor.
Select a piece of heavy armor.
Select a newly acquired outfit that changes appearance.
Select recommended equipment from your inventory.

Switching left hand
equipment to right hand.

Switching right hand
equipment to left hand.
Physical attack power for both hands.
Physical attack power for the right hand.
Physical attack power for the left hand.
Ability to hit with physical attacks.

Ability to evade physical attacks.
Also affects enemy attack hit count.

Affects magic attack power and
chance to inflict status ailments.

Affects magic defense, healing power,
and chance to avoid status ailments.

Affects physical attack accuracy and
Brave Attack rate.

Affects physical attack evasion, hit
count, speed, and first strike rate.

Reduces damage from the specified
element.

Nullifies damage from the specified
element.

Deals minor damage each combat turn,
or after traveling a certain distance.

Greatly reduces physical attack
accuracy. Cannot evade physical attacks.

Unable to use abilities such as magic
that require you to speak.

Unable to act or evade physical attacks.
Removed when hit by a physical attack.
Unable to act or evade physical attacks.

Unable to use Brave or Default, and
BP of 1 or more is reduced to 0.

Performs random actions against
a random target.
Acts as if allied with the enemy.
Knocked out regardless of HP remaining.

Unable to act or evade physical
attacks. Can be removed with dispel.
Select a part that adds elemental damage.
Select a part that adds power.
Select a part that adds damage to a certain enemy family.
Select a part that inflicts a status ailment.
Select a part that increases HP recovered.
Select a part that cures status ailments.
Select a part that increases MP recovered.
Select a part that increases BP.
Select a part that adds turns.
Select a part that boosts stats.
Select a part granting resistance to status ailments.
Select a part that boosts elemental resistance.
Select a part that reduces stats.
Select a part that reduces status ailment resistance.
Select a part that weakens elemental resistance.

Do not enter any personal information.

Update your data after using Send in battle.

Set whether to acquire job points after battle.
Set the enemy encounter rate when traveling.
Press up/down to set the encounter rate.

The encounter rate has been
set to a low value. Note that
this will make it harder to
gain levels.

You will no longer encounter
enemies while moving. Note
that this will make it harder to
gain levels.

You won’t be able to complete the
following achievements. Proceed anyway?
Play the game until The End on Hard
Play the game until The End with zero monster encounters
Play the game with zero monster encounters on Hard

The language settings have been changed.
Do you want to use these settings?

Voice: 【%ls】
Text: 【%ls】

An SP Drink restores 3 SP when you drink one!
The upper limit for SP is 3, so you can’t gain
more than that. But don’t worry—if you’re in
danger of wasting SP, you won't be able to
use the drink. You can’t use Bravely Second
if your SP is negative, so restore it when you
can!

Support number
%ls

The first one is available at a special price!

Take advantage of this offer to see for yourself
what an SP Drink can do.
Select how many you want to use.

There is nothing you can buy right now.
Please see the official website for details.

A network error has occurred.
Please try again later.

Internet communication can
take some time to complete.
Do you want to proceed?

Change character name(s) to the
default name(s) for %ls?

You cannot use an SP Drink now, as it will put you
over the max SP limit.

* The max SP limit is 3.

Restore %s
to the default?
* The following settings will not be changed:
- Autosave
- Network connection
- Difficulty

An item which adds 3 SP when
consumed.

Enabling can decrease flickering, but may also increase video judder.
Set graphic quality all at once.
Setting as unlimited will smooth movements, but lower stability.
Set the type of graphic smoothing (FXAA: prioritize processing; TAA: prioritize image quality).
Setting as high will increase shadow quality, but place a higher load on the GPU.
Enabling will add blur effects to the background, but place a higher load on the GPU.
Graphics settings can only be changed from the title screen or while in town.
